quality.formatting_issues: Minor: The reference to "[Attunement](#section-attunement)" and "[stunned](#stunned)" implies external linking/document structure, which is fine for internal documentation but requires context for standalone data.

mechanics.bonus: +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.
mechanics.attunement_requirements: Requires attunement AND wearing both a belt of giant strength (any) and gauntlets of ogre power. Attunement breaks if either item is removed.
mechanics.attunement_effect: Strength score increases by 4 (can exceed 20, max 30).

special_ability.name: Giant's Bane
special_ability.trigger: Rolling a 20 on an attack roll against a giant.
special_ability.effect: Target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or die.

charged_ability.action: Expend 1 charge to make a ranged weapon attack (Range: 20/60 ft).
charged_ability.on_hit_effect: Target and all creatures within 30 feet must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of the wielder's next turn. Thunderclap audible up to 300 feet.

mechanics.power_level: Legendary, highly potent due to instant kill potential against giants and powerful area-of-effect stun/debuff.

analysis.notes: The dual attunement requirement linked to specific items makes this weapon extremely situational and powerful for its niche (giant slaying), mitigating the raw power slightly by requiring specific preparatory gear.
